channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CUMMINSIND] Cummins India Ltd. Revises Remuneration for Managing Director
item.description:
Cummins India Ltd. announced the outcome of their Board meeting held on March 11, 2026. The Board, on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee, approved the revision in remuneration of Ms. Shveta Arya, the Managing Director of the Company. The Company will seek approval from the Members for this revision in remuneration. M/s. Mehta & Mehta, Company Secretaries, Pune, have been appointed as a Scrutinizer to ensure a fair and transparent e-voting process. The Scrutinizer's report and e-voting results will be submitted to the Stock Exchange(s) within the prescribed timeline.

  • Cummins India Ltd. revised the remuneration of Managing Director, Ms. Shveta Arya
  • The revision in remuneration will be subject to approval from the Members of the Company
  • M/s. Mehta & Mehta, Company Secretaries, Pune, appointed as Scrutinizer for the e-voting process
  • The Scrutinizer's report and e-voting results will be submitted to the Stock Exchange(s) within the prescribed timeline

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CUMMINS INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TAKE] Take Solutions Ltd Forms Wholly Owned Subsidiary - Take Ventures Private Limited
item.description:
Take Solutions Ltd has formed a wholly owned subsidiary named 'Take Ventures Private Limited' with a CIN of U62099MH2026PTC469230. The new subsidiary has an authorized share capital of Rs. 25,00,000 divided into 2,50,000 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each. The subsidiary has been incorporated to support the company's growth and expansion in the technology sector by undertaking software development, IT services, consultancy and allied technology activities.

  • Take Solutions Ltd forms a wholly owned subsidiary, Take Ventures Private Limited.
  • The new subsidiary has an authorized share capital of Rs. 25,00,000 divided into 2,50,000 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each.
  • Take Ventures Private Limited will support the company's growth and expansion in the technology sector.
  • The subsidiary will engage in the design, development, marketing and servicing of software, IT solutions, computer hardware and related products and services, including IT consultancy, data processing, computer training, and other technology-enabled solutions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TAKE SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [GEMAROMA] Gem Aromatics Ltd Receives Disclosure from Designated Person under SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Gem Aromatics Ltd has received a disclosure from a Designated Person in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure is from Mrs. Kaksha Vipul Parekh, who has acquired 0.096% voting rights of the company. The total shares held by Mrs. Parekh and her Persons Acting in Concert (PAC) after the acquisition is 8.546%. This information has been placed on the company's website.

  • Gem Aromatics Ltd received a disclosure from a Designated Person under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The acquirer is Mrs. Kaksha Vipul Parekh, who has acquired 0.096% voting rights of the company.
  • Mrs. Parekh has acquired a total of 50,000 shares, which amounts to 0.096% voting rights.
  • After the acquisition, Mrs. Parekh and her PACs hold a total of 8.546% voting rights.
  • The disclosure has been placed on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gem Aromatics Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [CRAMC] Canara Robeco AMC Appoints New Company Secretary & Compliance Officer
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Canara Robeco Asset Management Company Ltd. at its Meeting held on March 11, 2026, appointed Ms. Hemangi Shailesh Patil as the new Company Secretary and Compliance Officer of the Company, effective from April 1, 2026. Mr. Ashutosh Pramod Vaidya has resigned from his position as Company Secretary to explore alternative career options.

  • Ms. Hemangi Shailesh Patil appointed as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer from April 1, 2026
  • Mr. Ashutosh Pramod Vaidya resigns as Company Secretary to explore alternative career options
  • Amendments to the Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosures of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Canara Robeco Asset Management Company Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZODIAC] Zodiac Energy Ltd Acquires Majority Stake in Shamli Solar Projects LLP for Rs. 19,600
item.description:
Zodiac Energy Ltd has acquired a 98% ownership interest in Shamli Solar Projects LLP, a Limited Liability Partnership (LLP) engaged in setting up solar power plants, producing electricity through solar energy, and selling solar power. The acquisition was completed on March 11, 2026, for a cash consideration of Rs. 19,600. This acquisition will result in further expansion of Zodiac Energy's business and Shamli Solar Projects LLP has become a subsidiary of Zodiac Energy Ltd.

  • Zodiac Energy Ltd acquires 98% stake in Shamli Solar Projects LLP
  • Shamli Solar Projects LLP is engaged in setting up solar power plants and selling solar power
  • Acquisition completed on March 11, 2026, for a cash consideration of Rs. 19,600
  • Shamli Solar Projects LLP has become a subsidiary of Zodiac Energy Ltd
  • Acquisition will result in further expansion of Zodiac Energy's business

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zodiac Energy Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HEG] HEG Ltd Confirms Zero Rejections in Share Transfer Requests for February-March 2026
item.description:
HEG Ltd, in accordance with the SEBI Circular No. HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/1/3750/2026, has reported on the re-lodgement of transfer requests for physical shares from February 5, 2026, to March 4, 2026. The report, received from the Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, M/s MCS Share Transfer Agent Limited, indicates that there were no rejections during this period. This development underscores the company's commitment to efficient share transfer processes.

  • HEG Ltd reports zero rejections in share transfer requests for February-March 2026
  • The report is in accordance with the SEBI Circular No. HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/1/3750/2026
  • The re-lodgement period for physical shares was from February 5, 2026, to March 4, 2026
  • MCS Share Transfer Agent Limited handled the re-lodgement process
  • This update reflects HEG Ltd's commitment to efficient share transfer processes

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HEG LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [RELAXO] Relaxo Footwears Ltd: Chief Financial Officer, Mr. Prince Jain, Resigns Effective Immediately
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Relaxo Footwears Ltd announced the resignation of its Chief Financial Officer (CFO), Mr. Prince Jain, with immediate effect. The resignation was tendered on March 11, 2026, and the company has acknowledged the same. Mr. Jain has served as the CFO and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) of the company and his departure is due to pursue opportunities outside the organization. The company has complied with the necessary regulations and disclosures as per the SEBI Listing Regulations and SEBI Master Circular.

  • Relaxo Footwears Ltd announces the resignation of its Chief Financial Officer, Mr. Prince Jain.
  • Mr. Jain has resigned from his position with immediate effect.
  • His resignation is due to pursue opportunities outside the organization.
  • The company has acknowledged the resignation and complied with necessary regulations and disclosures.
  • Mr. Jain has served as the CFO and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELAXO FOOTWEARS LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [REDINGTON] Redington Ltd. Receives Favourable Order Quashing INR 230.21 Cr Demand from Income Tax Department
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Redington Ltd. has announced that it has received a favourable order from the Commissioner of Income Tax (Appeals) quashing the demand of INR 230.21 Cr out of the total demand of Rs 233.66 crores raised by the Assessing officer for the Assessment Year 2020-21. The company had contested the demand before the appropriate appellate authorities and has now obtained a favourable order. The details of the order will be updated on the company's website.

  • Redington Ltd. receives favourable order from Commissioner of Income Tax (Appeals)
  • Order quashes INR 230.21 Cr demand out of total INR 233.66 crores for Assessment Year 2020-21
  • Company had contested the demand before appellate authorities
  • Order will be updated on the company's website
  • No monetary impact on the company's financial, operational or other activities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Redington Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [CEIGALL] Ceigall India Ltd and Sushee Infra & Mining Limited Joint Venture Emerges as L1 Bidder for Road Construction Project in Arunachal Pradesh
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ceigall India Limited (CIL) and Sushee Infra & Mining Limited (SIML) have jointly emerged as the L1 bidder for the construction of a road from km 0.000 to km 55.725 of Huri-Taliha section of NH-913 (Frontier Highway) to Intermediate Lane on EPC mode in the State of Arunachal Pradesh. This announcement was made in reference to the tender ID: 2025 MoRTH 868241 1 dated 11th March 2026 by the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways. It is important to note that there was an inadvertent error in S. No. 4 of the table providing details under regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, which has now been corrected.

  • Ceigall India Limited and Sushee Infra & Mining Limited joint venture emerged as L1 bidder
  • Construction of road from km 0.000 to km 55.725 of Huri-Taliha section of NH-913 (Frontier Highway) to Intermediate Lane on EPC mode in the State of Arunachal Pradesh
  • Tender ID: 2025 MoRTH 868241 1 dated 11th March 2026 by the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways
  • Inadvertent error in S. No. 4 of the table providing details under regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 has been corrected

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ceigall India Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SATIN] Satin Creditcare Network Ltd. to Consider Fund Raising Proposal on March 16, 2026
item.description:
Satin Creditcare Network Ltd. has announced that a Board of Directors meeting is scheduled for March 16, 2026. The agenda includes the consideration and approval of a fund raising proposal. This will be carried out through the issuance of listed, secured/unsecured, non-convertible debentures on a private placement basis. The meeting is in accordance with Regulations 29 and 50, and other applicable regulations of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Satin Creditcare Network Ltd. has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for March 16, 2026.
  • The agenda includes the consideration and approval of a fund raising proposal.
  • The fund raising will be carried out through the issuance of listed, secured/unsecured, non-convertible debentures on a private placement basis.
  • The meeting is in accordance with Regulations 29 and 50, and other applicable regulations of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Satin Creditcare Network Ltd | Category: Investment
